start.welcome_user:
Welcome to the Legal Clinic Bot!

Here you can:
- Ask legal questions
- Browse frequently asked questions (FAQ)
- Track the status of your requests

Select an action from the menu below:

📄 [Privacy Policy and Terms of Use](https://huquqbot.uz/privacy)
start.welcome_student:
Welcome!

You will receive notifications about new requests. Use the web panel to manage your work.

onboarding.offer_required: ⚠️ You must accept the public offer agreement to use the bot. Press /start

help.user:
📚 **Legal Clinic Bot Usage Guide**

**Main Functions:**

🔸 **Ask a Question**
   • Select the appropriate category for your legal question
   • Describe your situation in detail (minimum 150 characters)
   • Review the text and confirm submission

🔸 **FAQ (Frequently Asked Questions)**
   • Browse ready answers to popular questions
   • Select a category and find a suitable question

🔸 **My Requests**
   • Track the status of your requests
   • View received answers

**📋 Request Statuses:**
• ⏳ Under Review
• 👨‍💼 Awaiting Executor
• 🔄 In Progress
• ✅ Answer Under Review
• ✅ Closed
• ❌ Declined

**📝 Question Requirements:**
• Minimum 150 characters in request text
• Clearly formulate your legal situation

**⏰ Processing Time:**
• Admin review: usually within 1-2 days
• Student answer preparation: 3-7 days
• Admin answer review: 1-2 days
